info.english_meaning: to sound to gather to be crowded to surround
info.hindI_arTa: Sabda karanA AvAja karanA BIq0a honA GeranA
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: dantyAdi:  ' SabdasaNGAtayorDAtvo: styAyatyekasya so na zaH ' (Slo. 7) - devaH

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'saMstyAyaviSezA hyete grAmo Gozo nagaraM saMvAha iti' (pA0 7314 sUtraBAzye) saMstyAyo nivAsa iti kEyawaH
'yo vE svArTetAM yatA~ SrAnto hIyate uta sa nizwyAya saha vasati' (tE0 saM0 624) nizwyAya svagrAmAnnirgatya
